name: veeam-backup-replication
label: Veeam Backup & Replication
description: Veeam Backup & Replication is a data protection and disaster recovery solution that provides backup, recovery, and replication for virtual, physical, and cloud-based workloads.

fields.title: Server URL
fields.name: resource
fields.tooltip: Public IPv4 address or DNS hostname of the machine where Veeam Backup & Replication is installed.
fields.description: Public IPv4 address or DNS hostname of the machine where Veeam Backup & Replication is installed.

fields.title: Port
fields.name: port
fields.tooltip: Port is the REST API port number set during Veeam Backup & Replication installation. The default port number is 9419.
fields.description: Port is the REST API port number set during Veeam Backup & Replication installation. The default port number is 9419.

fields.title: Username
fields.name: username
fields.tooltip: Username used to access the Veeam Backup & Replication server.
fields.description: Username used to access the Veeam Backup & Replication server.

fields.title: Password
fields.name: password
fields.tooltip: Password used to access the Veeam Backup & Replication server.
fields.description: Password used to access the Veeam Backup & Replication server.

fields.title: API Revision
fields.name: api_revision
fields.tooltip: Version and revision of the Veeam Backup & Replication REST API. Must be in the following format: <version>-<revision>. e.g. 1.2-rev1
fields.description: Version and revision of the Veeam Backup & Replication REST API. Must be in the following format: <version>-<revision>. e.g. 1.2-rev1

fields.title: Verify SSL
fields.name: verify_ssl
fields.description:
Specifies whether the SSL certificate for the server is to be verified.
By default, this option is selected, i.e., set to true.

operations.title: Get Server List
operations.description: Retrieves a list of all servers and hosts added to the backup infrastructure based on the input parameters that you have specified.

parameters.title: Filter Mode
parameters.name: filter_mode

Simple.title: Platform
Simple.name: platform

VMware.title: Host Name
VMware.name: hostName
VMware.tooltip: Specify the name of the VMware vSphere server that hosts the object to filter results.
VMware.description: Specify the name of the VMware vSphere server that hosts the object to filter results.

VMware.title: Name
VMware.name: name
VMware.tooltip: Specify the name of the VMware vSphere object to filter results.
VMware.description: Specify the name of the VMware vSphere object to filter results.

VMware.title: Type
VMware.name: type
VMware.tooltip: Select the type of the VMware vSphere object to filter results.
VMware.description: Select the type of the VMware vSphere object to filter results. You can select from the following options: "Unknown", "Virtual Machine", "vCenter Server", "Data Center", "Cluster", "Host", "Resource Pool", "Folder", "Datastore", "Datastore Cluster", "Storage Policy", "Template", "Compute Resource", "Virtual App", "Tag", "Category", "Multi Tag", "Network", "DVS Network"

VMware.title: Object ID
VMware.name: objectId
VMware.tooltip: Specify the ID of the VMware vSphere object to filter results.
VMware.description: Specify the ID of the VMware vSphere object to filter results.

Cloud Director.title: Host Name
Cloud Director.name: hostName
Cloud Director.tooltip: Specify the name of the VMware Cloud Director server that hosts the object to filter results.
Cloud Director.description: Specify the name of the VMware Cloud Director server that hosts the object to filter results.

Cloud Director.title: Name
Cloud Director.name: name
Cloud Director.tooltip: Specify the name of the VMware Cloud Director object to filter results.
Cloud Director.description: Specify the name of the VMware Cloud Director object to filter results.

Cloud Director.title: Type
Cloud Director.name: type
Cloud Director.tooltip: Select the type of the VMware Cloud Director object to filter results.
Cloud Director.description: Select the type of the VMware Cloud Director object to filter results. You can select from the following options: "Unknown", "Virtual Machine", "Cloud Director Server", "Organization", "Organization VDC", "vApp", "Storage Policy", "Network", "vCenter", "VM Template", "Datastore"

Cloud Director.title: Object ID
Cloud Director.name: objectId
Cloud Director.tooltip: Specify the ID of the VMware Cloud Director object to filter results.
Cloud Director.description: Specify the ID of the VMware Cloud Director object to filter results.

Simple.tooltip: Select a platform type to return only results that match the given criteria.
Simple.description: Select a platform type to return only results that match the given criteria. You can select from the following options: "VMware", "Cloud Director"

Simple.title: Size
Simple.name: size
Simple.tooltip: Specify a size to return only results that match the given criteria.
Simple.description: Specify a size to return only results that match the given criteria.

Simple.title: Uniform Resource Name
Simple.name: urn
Simple.tooltip: Specify a uniform resource name to return only results that match the given criteria.
Simple.description: Specify a uniform resource name to return only results that match the given criteria.

Simple.title: Strict Match
Simple.name: strict_match
Simple.tooltip: Specifies whether to match exact value only.
Simple.description:
Specifies whether to match exact value only.
By default, this option is not selected, i.e., set to false.

Advanced.title: Filter
Advanced.name: filter
Advanced.tooltip: Specify a filter, in JSON format, to return only results that match the given criteria.
Advanced.description: Specify a filter, in JSON format, to return only results that match the given criteria.

parameters.tooltip: Select how to input filter criteria: Simple (individual parameters) or Advanced (raw JSON filter).
parameters.description: Select how to input filter criteria: Simple (individual parameters) or Advanced (raw JSON filter).

parameters.title: Sort By
parameters.name: sort_by

Property.title: Property
Property.name: property
Property.tooltip: Property on which to sort the results
Property.description: Select the property on which to sort the results. You can select from the following options: "Platform", "Size", "Host Name", "Name", "Type", "Object ID", "URN"

Property.title: Order
Property.name: direction
Property.tooltip: Order in which to sort the results
Property.description: Select the order in which to sort the results. You can select from following options: Ascending(default) or Descending.

parameters.tooltip: Sort result by property
parameters.description: Sorts the results by the specified property and order the results.

parameters.name: skip
parameters.title: Offset
parameters.description: Specify the count of the first few records to skip while retrieving the result. The default value is 0.
parameters.tooltip: Count of records to skip while retrieving the result. The default value is 0.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.title: Limit
parameters.description: Specify the number of results to return. The default value is 50.
parameters.tooltip: Number of results to return. The default value is 50.

operations.title: Get Unstructured Data Server List
operations.description: Retrieves a list of all unstructured data servers available on a backup server based on the input parameters that you have specified.

parameters.title: Name Filter
parameters.name: nameFilter
parameters.tooltip: Filters unstructured data servers by the nameFilter pattern. The pattern can match any unstructured data server parameter. To substitute one or more characters, use the asterisk (*) character at the beginning and/or at the end.
parameters.description: Filters unstructured data servers by the nameFilter pattern. The pattern can match any unstructured data server parameter. To substitute one or more characters, use the asterisk (*) character at the beginning and/or at the end. For reference: https://helpcenter.veeam.com/docs/backup/vbr_rest/filter.html?ver=120

parameters.title: Sort By
parameters.name: orderColumn
parameters.tooltip: Sorts unstructured data servers by one of the Unstructured Data Servers parameters.
parameters.description: Select the parameter on which to sort the results. You can select from the following options: "Name", "Description"

parameters.title: Order Ascending
parameters.name: orderAsc
parameters.tooltip: If true, sorts unstructured data servers in the ascending order by the Sort By parameter.
parameters.description: If true, sorts unstructured data servers in the ascending order by the Sort By parameter.

parameters.name: skip
parameters.title: Offset
parameters.description: Specify the count of the first few records to skip while retrieving the result. The default value is 0.
parameters.tooltip: Count of records to skip while retrieving the result. The default value is 0.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.title: Limit
parameters.description: Specify the number of results to return. The default value is 50.
parameters.tooltip: Number of results to return. The default value is 50.

operations.title: Get Microsoft Entra ID Tenant List
operations.description: Retrieves a list of all Microsoft Entra ID tenants added to the backup server based on the input parameters that you have specified.

parameters.title: Name Filter
parameters.name: nameFilter
parameters.tooltip: Filters Microsoft Entra ID tenants by the nameFilter pattern. The pattern can match any Microsoft Entra ID tenant parameter. To substitute one or more characters, use the asterisk (*) character at the beginning and/or at the end.
parameters.description: Filters Microsoft Entra ID tenants by the nameFilter pattern. The pattern can match any Microsoft Entra ID tenant parameter. To substitute one or more characters, use the asterisk (*) character at the beginning and/or at the end. For reference: https://helpcenter.veeam.com/docs/backup/vbr_rest/filter.html?ver=120

parameters.title: Sort By
parameters.name: orderColumn
parameters.tooltip: Sorts Microsoft Entra ID tenants by one of the tenant parameters.
parameters.description: Select the parameter on which to sort the results. You can select from the following options: "Name", "Description"

parameters.title: Order Ascending
parameters.name: orderAsc
parameters.tooltip: If true, sorts Microsoft Entra ID tenants in the ascending order by the Sort By parameter.
parameters.description: If true, sorts Microsoft Entra ID tenants in the ascending order by the Sort By parameter.

parameters.name: skip
parameters.title: Offset
parameters.description: Specify the count of the first few records to skip while retrieving the result. The default value is 0.
parameters.tooltip: Count of records to skip while retrieving the result. The default value is 0.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.title: Limit
parameters.description: Specify the number of results to return. The default value is 50.
parameters.tooltip: Number of results to return. The default value is 50.

operations.title: Create Malware Event
operations.description: Creates a new malware event based on the input parameters that you have specified.

parameters.title: Detection Time
parameters.name: detectionTimeUtc
parameters.tooltip: Select the detection date and time, in UTC.
parameters.description: Select the detection date and time, in UTC.

parameters.title: Machine
parameters.name: machine

value.fqdn: Fully Qualified Domain Name of the machine.
value.uuid: BIOS UUID of the machine. Specify the UUID in the 8-4-4-4-12 format: xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx.

parameters.tooltip: Machine that you want to mark with the malware event. Specify at least 2 parameters.
parameters.description: Machine that you want to mark with the malware event. Specify at least 2 parameters. Note that Veeam Backup & Replication can identify a machine by its FQDN, IPv4 address and IPv6 address only if the machine has been powered on during the backup. If you back up a powered-off machine, Veeam Backup & Replication will not get the machine IP addresses and domain name and will not be able to identify the machine.

parameters.title: Details
parameters.name: details
parameters.tooltip: Specify the event description.
parameters.description: Specify the event description.

parameters.title: Engine
parameters.name: engine
parameters.tooltip: Specify the detection engine.
parameters.description: Specify the detection engine.

operations.title: Get Malware Event List
operations.description: Retrieves a list of all malware events created on the backup server based on the input parameters that you have specified.

parameters.title: Start Time
parameters.name: detectedAfterTimeUtcFilter
parameters.tooltip: Returns events created after the specified time, in UTC.
parameters.description: Returns events created after the specified time, in UTC.

parameters.title: End Time
parameters.name: detectedBeforeTimeUtcFilter
parameters.tooltip: Returns events created before the specified time, in UTC.
parameters.description: Returns events created before the specified time, in UTC.

parameters.title: Event Type
parameters.name: typeFilter
parameters.tooltip: Select the type of the event to filter results.
parameters.description: Select the type of the event to filter results. You can select from the following options: "Unknown", "Deleted Useful Files", "Ransomware Notes", "Malware Extensions", "Encrypted Data", "YARA Scan", "Antivirus Scan", "Renamed Files", "Indicator of Compromise"

parameters.title: Event State
parameters.name: stateFilter
parameters.tooltip: Select the state of the event to filter results.
parameters.description: Select the state of the event to filter results. You can select from the following options: "Created", "False Positive"

parameters.title: Event Severity
parameters.name: severityFilter
parameters.tooltip: Select the severity of the event to filter results.
parameters.description: Select the severity of the event to filter results. You can select from the following options: "Clean", "Suspicious", "Infected"

parameters.title: Event Source
parameters.name: sourceFilter
parameters.tooltip: Select the source of the event to filter results.
parameters.description: Select the source of the event to filter results. You can select from the following options: "Manual", "Internal Veeam Detector", "External", "Mark as Clean Event"

parameters.title: Backup Object ID
parameters.name: backupObjectIdFilter
parameters.tooltip: Filters events by backup object ID.
parameters.description: Filters events by backup object ID.

parameters.title: Created By
parameters.name: createdByFilter
parameters.tooltip: Filters events by the createdBy pattern. To substitute one or more characters, use the asterisk (*) character at the beginning, at the end or both.
parameters.description: Filters events by the createdBy pattern. To substitute one or more characters, use the asterisk (*) character at the beginning, at the end or both.

parameters.title: Engine
parameters.name: engineFilter
parameters.tooltip: Filters events by the engine pattern. To substitute one or more characters, use the asterisk (*) character at the beginning, at the end or both.
parameters.description: Filters events by the engine pattern. To substitute one or more characters, use the asterisk (*) character at the beginning, at the end or both.

parameters.title: Sort By
parameters.name: orderColumn
parameters.tooltip: Sorts events by one of the event parameters.
parameters.description: Select the parameter on which to sort the results. You can select from the following options: "Type", "DetectionTimeUtc", "BackupObjectId", "State", "Source", "Severity", "CreatedBy", "Engine"

parameters.title: Order Ascending
parameters.name: orderAsc
parameters.tooltip: If true, sorts events in the ascending order by the Sort By parameter.
parameters.description: If true, sorts events in the ascending order by the Sort By parameter.

parameters.name: skip
parameters.title: Offset
parameters.description: Specify the count of the first few records to skip while retrieving the result. The default value is 0.
parameters.tooltip: Count of records to skip while retrieving the result. The default value is 0.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.title: Limit
parameters.description: Specify the number of results to return. The default value is 50.
parameters.tooltip: Number of results to return. The default value is 50.

operations.title: Scan Backups with Antivirus or YARA Rules
operations.description: Scans backups with antivirus or YARA rules based on the input parameters that you have specified.

parameters.title: Backup ID
parameters.name: backupId
parameters.tooltip: Specify the ID of the backup.
parameters.description: Specify the ID of the backup.

parameters.title: Backup Object ID
parameters.name: backupObjectId
parameters.tooltip: Specify the ID of the backup object.
parameters.description: Specify the ID of the backup object.

parameters.title: Scan Mode
parameters.name: scanMode
parameters.tooltip: Select the backup scan mode.
parameters.description: Select the backup scan mode. You can select from the following options: "Most Recent", "All In Interval", "First In Interval"

parameters.title: Scan Engine
parameters.name: scanEngine

YARA Rule.title: YARA Rule File Name
YARA Rule.name: fileName
YARA Rule.tooltip: Specify the YARA rule file name.
YARA Rule.description: Specify the YARA rule file name.

parameters.tooltip: Select the type of backup scan engine.
parameters.description: Select the type of backup scan engine. You can select from the following options: "Antivirus Engine", "YARA Rule"

parameters.title: Custom Scan Range
parameters.name: scanRange

true.title: From
true.name: from
true.tooltip: Starting point of the backup scan range.
true.description: Starting point of the backup scan range.

true.title: To
true.name: to
true.tooltip: Ending point of the backup scan range.
true.description: Ending point of the backup scan range.

parameters.tooltip: Backup scan range. If you do not specify this parameter, Veeam Backup & Replication will scan all available restore points.
parameters.description: Select to specify backup scan range. If you do not select this parameter, Veeam Backup & Replication will scan all available restore points.

parameters.title: Continue Scan
parameters.name: continueScan
parameters.tooltip: If true, the backup scan will continue even after it finds affected restore points.
parameters.description: If true, the backup scan will continue even after it finds affected restore points.

operations.title: Start Security & Compliance Analyzer
operations.description: Starts security & compliance analyzer on the backup server.

operations.title: Get Security & Compliance Analyzer Results
operations.description: Retrieves best practices compliance result from the backup server based on the input parameters that you have specified.

operations.title: Get Managed Server List
operations.description: Retrieves a list of all servers that are added to the backup infrastructure based on the input parameters that you have specified.

parameters.title: Name Filter
parameters.name: nameFilter
parameters.tooltip: Filters servers by the nameFilter pattern. The pattern can match any server parameter. To substitute one or more characters, use the asterisk (*) character at the beginning and/or at the end.
parameters.description: Filters servers by the nameFilter pattern. The pattern can match any server parameter. To substitute one or more characters, use the asterisk (*) character at the beginning and/or at the end. For reference: https://helpcenter.veeam.com/docs/backup/vbr_rest/filter.html?ver=120

parameters.title: Server Type
parameters.name: typeFilter
parameters.tooltip: Select the type of the server to filter results.
parameters.description: Select the type of the server to filter results. You can select from the following options: "Windows Host", "Linux Host", "Vi Host", "Cloud Director Host"

parameters.title: Vi Type
parameters.name: viTypeFilter
parameters.tooltip: Select the type of the VMware vSphere server to filter results.
parameters.description: Select the type of the VMware vSphere server to filter results. You can select from the following options: "ESX", "ESXi", "VC"

parameters.title: Sort By
parameters.name: orderColumn
parameters.tooltip: Sorts unstructured data servers by one of the Unstructured Data Servers parameters.
parameters.description: Select the parameter on which to sort the results. You can select from the following options: "Name", "Type", "Description"

parameters.title: Order Ascending
parameters.name: orderAsc
parameters.tooltip: If true, sorts unstructured data servers in the ascending order by the Sort By parameter.
parameters.description: If true, sorts unstructured data servers in the ascending order by the Sort By parameter.

parameters.name: skip
parameters.title: Offset
parameters.description: Specify the count of the first few records to skip while retrieving the result. The default value is 0.
parameters.tooltip: Count of records to skip while retrieving the result. The default value is 0.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.title: Limit
parameters.description: Specify the number of results to return. The default value is 50.
parameters.tooltip: Number of results to return. The default value is 50.

operations.title: Start Instant Recovery
operations.description: Starts instant recovery of a VMware vSphere VM to VMware vSphere. You can recover a VM from the specified restore point to the original location with initial VM settings, or to any location but with different settings.

parameters.title: Restore Point ID
parameters.name: restorePointId
parameters.tooltip: Specify the ID of the restore point.
parameters.description: Specify the ID of the restore point.

parameters.title: Restore Mode
parameters.name: type

Customized.title: Datastore
Customized.name: datastore
Customized.tooltip: Datastore that keeps redo logs with changes that take place while a VM is running from a backup.
Customized.description: Datastore that keeps redo logs with changes that take place while a VM is running from a backup.

Customized.title: Destination
Customized.name: destination
Customized.tooltip: Destination where the recovered VM resides.
Customized.description: Destination where the recovered VM resides.

Customized.title: Overwrite
Customized.name: overwrite
Customized.tooltip: If true, Veeam Backup & Replication overwrites the existing VM that has the same name.
Customized.description: If true, Veeam Backup & Replication overwrites the existing VM that has the same name.

parameters.tooltip: Select the restore mode.
parameters.description: Select the restore mode. You can select from the following options: "Original Location", "Customized"

parameters.title: Enable Antivirus Scan
parameters.name: antivirusScanEnabled

true.title: virusDetectionAction
true.name: virusDetectionAction
true.tooltip: Action that Veeam Backup & Replication takes if the antivirus software finds a threat.
true.description: Action that Veeam Backup & Replication takes if the antivirus software finds a threat. You can select from the following options: "Disable Network", "Abort Recovery", "Ignore"

true.title: Enable Entire Volume Scan
true.name: entireVolumeScanEnabled
true.tooltip: If true, the antivirus continues machine scan after the first malware is found.
true.description: If true, the antivirus continues machine scan after the first malware is found.

parameters.tooltip: If true, Veeam Backup & Replication scans machine data with antivirus software before restoring the machine to the production environment.
parameters.description: If true, Veeam Backup & Replication scans machine data with antivirus software before restoring the machine to the production environment.

parameters.title: Restore VM Tags
parameters.name: vmTagsRestoreEnabled
parameters.tooltip: If true, Veeam Backup & Replication restores tags that were assigned to the original VM, and assign them to the restored VM.
parameters.description: If true, Veeam Backup & Replication restores tags that were assigned to the original VM, and assign them to the restored VM.

parameters.title: Enable NICs
parameters.name: nicsEnabled
parameters.tooltip: If true, the restored VM is connected to the network.
parameters.description: If true, the restored VM is connected to the network.

parameters.title: Power Up
parameters.name: powerUp
parameters.tooltip: If true, Veeam Backup & Replication powers on the restored VM on the target host.
parameters.description: If true, Veeam Backup & Replication powers on the restored VM on the target host.

parameters.title: Reason
parameters.name: reason
parameters.tooltip: Reason for restoring the VM.
parameters.description: Specify the reason for restoring the VM.

operations.title: Get Backup List
operations.description: Retrieves a list of all backups that are created on or imported to the backup server based on the input parameters that you have specified.

parameters.title: Name Filter
parameters.name: nameFilter
parameters.tooltip: Filters backups by the nameFilter pattern. The pattern can match any backup parameter. To substitute one or more characters, use the asterisk (*) character at the beginning, at the end or both.
parameters.description: Filters backups by the nameFilter pattern. The pattern can match any backup parameter. To substitute one or more characters, use the asterisk (*) character at the beginning, at the end or both.

parameters.title: Created After
parameters.name: createdAfterFilter
parameters.tooltip: Returns backups that are created after the specified date and time.
parameters.description: Returns backups that are created after the specified date and time.

parameters.title: Created Before
parameters.name: createdBeforeFilter
parameters.tooltip: Returns backups that are created before the specified date and time.
parameters.description: Returns backups that are created before the specified date and time.

parameters.title: Platform ID
parameters.name: platformIdFilter
parameters.tooltip: Filters backups by ID of the backup object platform.
parameters.description: Filters backups by ID of the backup object platform.

parameters.title: Job ID
parameters.name: jobIdFilter
parameters.tooltip: Filters backups by ID of the parent job.
parameters.description: Filters backups by ID of the parent job.

parameters.title: Policy Tag
parameters.name: policyTagFilter
parameters.tooltip: Filters backups by retention policy tag.
parameters.description: Filters backups by retention policy tag.

parameters.title: Sort By
parameters.name: orderColumn
parameters.tooltip: Sorts backups by one of the backup parameters.
parameters.description: Select the parameter on which to sort the results. You can select from the following options: "Name", "Creation Time", "Platform ID", "Job ID", "Policy Tag"

parameters.title: Order Ascending
parameters.name: orderAsc
parameters.tooltip: If true, sorts backups in the ascending order by the Sort By parameter.
parameters.description: If true, sorts backups in the ascending order by the Sort By parameter.

parameters.name: skip
parameters.title: Offset
parameters.description: Specify the count of the first few records to skip while retrieving the result. The default value is 0.
parameters.tooltip: Count of records to skip while retrieving the result. The default value is 0.

parameters.name: limit

operations.title: Get Repository State List
operations.description: Retrieves a list of all repository states. The states include repository location and brief statistics, such as repository capacity, free and used space based on the input parameters that you have specified.

parameters.title: Repository ID
parameters.name: idFilter
parameters.tooltip: Filters repository states by repository ID.
parameters.description: Filters repository states by repository ID.

parameters.title: Name Filter
parameters.name: nameFilter
parameters.tooltip: Filters repository states by the nameFilter pattern. The pattern can match any repository state parameter. To substitute one or more characters, use the asterisk (*) character at the beginning and/or at the end.
parameters.description: Filters repository states by the nameFilter pattern. The pattern can match any repository state parameter. To substitute one or more characters, use the asterisk (*) character at the beginning and/or at the end.

parameters.title: Repository Type
parameters.name: typeFilter
parameters.tooltip: Select the type of the repository to filter results.
parameters.description: Select the type of the repository to filter results. You can select from the following options: "Win Local" "Linux Local" "Smb" "Nfs" "Azure Blob" "Azure Data Box" "Azure Archive" "Amazon S3" "Amazon Snowball Edge" "Amazon S3 Glacier" "S3 Compatible" "Google Cloud" "IBM Cloud" "Extendable Repository" "DD Boost" "ExaGrid" "HP Store Once Integration" "Quantum" "Wasabi Cloud" "Linux Hardened" "Infinidat" "Fujitsu"

parameters.title: Repository Capacity
parameters.name: capacityFilter
parameters.tooltip: Filters repository states by repository capacity.
parameters.description: Filters repository states by repository capacity.

parameters.title: Repository Free Space
parameters.name: freeSpaceFilter
parameters.tooltip: Filters repository states by repository free space.
parameters.description: Filters repository states by repository free space.

parameters.title: Repository Used Space
parameters.name: usedSpaceFilter
parameters.tooltip: Filters repository states by repository used space.
parameters.description: Filters repository states by repository used space.

parameters.title: Is Online
parameters.name: isOnlineFilter
parameters.tooltip: Filters repository states by repository connection status.
parameters.description: Filters repository states by repository connection status.

parameters.title: Sort By
parameters.name: orderColumn
parameters.tooltip: Sorts repository states by one of the state parameters.
parameters.description: Select the parameter on which to sort the results. You can select from the following options: "Name" "Type" "Host" "Path" "Capacity" "Free" "Used Space" "Description"

parameters.title: Order Ascending
parameters.name: orderAsc
parameters.tooltip: If true, sorts repository states in the ascending order by the Sort By parameter.
parameters.description: If true, sorts repository states in the ascending order by the Sort By parameter.

parameters.name: skip
parameters.title: Offset
parameters.description: Specify the count of the first few records to skip while retrieving the result. The default value is 0.
parameters.tooltip: Count of records to skip while retrieving the result. The default value is 0.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.title: Limit
parameters.description: Specify the number of results to return. The default value is 50.
parameters.tooltip: Number of results to return. The default value is 50.

operations.title: Get Restore Point List
operations.description: Retrieves a list of all restore points created on the backup server based on the input parameters that you have specified.

parameters.title: Name Filter
parameters.name: nameFilter
parameters.tooltip: Filters restore points by the nameFilter pattern. The pattern can match any restore point parameter. To substitute one or more characters, use the asterisk (*) character at the beginning and/or at the end.
parameters.description: Filters restore points by the nameFilter pattern. The pattern can match any restore point parameter. To substitute one or more characters, use the asterisk (*) character at the beginning and/or at the end.

parameters.title: Created After
parameters.name: createdAfterFilter
parameters.tooltip: Returns restore points that are created after the specified date and time.
parameters.description: Returns restore points that are created after the specified date and time.

parameters.title: Created Before
parameters.name: createdBeforeFilter
parameters.tooltip: Returns restore points that are created before the specified date and time.
parameters.description: Returns restore points that are created before the specified date and time.

parameters.title: Platform ID
parameters.name: platformIdFilter
parameters.tooltip: Filters restore points by ID of the backup object platform.
parameters.description: Filters restore points by ID of the backup object platform.

parameters.title: Backup ID
parameters.name: backupIdFilter
parameters.tooltip: Filters restore points by backup ID.
parameters.description: Filters restore points by backup ID.

parameters.title: Backup Object ID
parameters.name: backupObjectIdFilter
parameters.tooltip: Filters restore points by backup object ID.
parameters.description: Filters restore points by backup object ID.

parameters.title: Platform Name
parameters.name: platformNameFilter
parameters.tooltip: Select the name of the platform to filter results.
parameters.description: Select the name of the platform to filter results. You can select from the following options: "VMware" "HyperV" "Cloud Director" "Windows Physical" "Linux Physical" "Tape" "Custom Platform" "Entra ID" "Unstructured Data" "Test"

parameters.title: Malware Status
parameters.name: malwareStatusFilter
parameters.tooltip: Select the status of the malware to filter results.
parameters.description: Select the status of the malware to filter results. You can select from the following options: "Clean" "Suspicious" "Infected"

parameters.title: Sort By
parameters.name: orderColumn
parameters.tooltip: Sorts restore points by one of the restore point parameters.
parameters.description: Select the parameter on which to sort the results. You can select from the following options: "Creation Time" "Platform ID" "Backup ID"

parameters.title: Order Ascending
parameters.name: orderAsc
parameters.tooltip: If true, sorts restore points in the ascending order by the Sort By parameter.
parameters.description: If true, sorts restore points in the ascending order by the Sort By parameter.

parameters.name: skip
parameters.title: Offset
parameters.description: Specify the count of the first few records to skip while retrieving the result. The default value is 0.
parameters.tooltip: Count of records to skip while retrieving the result. The default value is 0.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.title: Limit
parameters.description: Specify the number of results to return. The default value is 50.
parameters.tooltip: Number of results to return. The default value is 50.

operations.title: Execute an API Request
operations.description: Sends an API request to any Veeam Backup & Replication API endpoint based on specified HTTP method, endpoint, and other input parameters that you have specified, enabling flexible API interactions tailored to user needs.

parameters.name: method
parameters.title: HTTP Method
parameters.description:
Select an HTTP action for the request. You can select from the following options:  

DELETE 

GET 

PATCH 

POST 

PUT

parameters.title: Endpoint
parameters.name: endpoint
parameters.tooltip: Specify the target API URL path for example: backups
parameters.description: Specify the target API URL path for the request. For example, if the website is https://example.com and URL path is https://example.com/backups, the endpoint would be backups.

parameters.title: Query Parameters
parameters.name: query_params
parameters.description: (Optional) Specify any optional parameters to add to the URL and refine the request.

parameters.name: payload
parameters.title: Request Payload
parameters.description: (Optional) Specify data, as JSON, to be sent as the request payload (typically for POST or PUT requests).
